title: Washington DC Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Washington DC, with a Z-Score of +3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Washington DC are extreme, with a heat wave causing temperatures to soar. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The humidity is relatively low at 31%, but the wind speed is moderate at 7.4 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
